ddls:
CREATE TABLE "auctions" (
  "auction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each auction event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being auctioned */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the auction sale */,
  "opening_bid" REAL /* Opening bid for the auction */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Final sale price of the property */,
  "book_writ" TEXT /* Legal book/writ associated with the property */,
  "record_deed" INTEGER /* Deed record ID for the property */,
  "advertising_cost" REAL /* Cost of advertising the auction */,
  "sheriff_cost" REAL /* Cost incurred by sheriff services */,
  "other_cost" REAL /* Other associated costs */,
  "auction_status" TEXT /* Current status of the auction */,
  "auction_type" TEXT /* Type of auction */,
  "starting_time" TEXT /* Start time of the auction */,
  "ending_time" TEXT /* End time of the auction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sellers" (
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seller */,
  "seller_name" TEXT /* Name of the seller */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the seller */,
  "seller_address" TEXT /* Address of the seller */,
  "seller_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the seller */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the buyer */,
  "buyer_address" TEXT /* Address of the buyer */,
  "buyer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the buyer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attorneys" (
  "attorney_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attorney */,
  "attorney_name" TEXT /* Name of the attorney */,
  "law_firm" TEXT /* Law firm associated with the attorney */,
  "attorney_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the attorney */,
  "attorney_email" TEXT /* Email address of the attorney */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attorney_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wards" (
  "ward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ward */,
  "ward_number" INTEGER /* Ward number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ward */,
  "ward_boundary" TEXT /* Geographic boundary of the ward */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ward_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auction_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each auction participant entry */,
  "auction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the auction the participant is involved in */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer participating in the auction */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller involved in the auction */,
  "participant_role" TEXT /* Role of the participant in the auction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auction_participants_auction_id FOREIGN KEY ("auction_id") REFERENCES auctions ("auction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auction_participants_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auction_participants_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES sellers ("seller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auction_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "auction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the auction associated with the report */,
  "total_bids" INTEGER /* Total number of bids received */,
  "highest_bid" REAL /* Highest bid placed during the auction */,
  "final_sale_price" REAL /* Final sale price resulting from the auction */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_auction_reports_auction_id FOREIGN KEY ("auction_id") REFERENCES auctions ("auction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advertising" (
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advertisement entry */,
  "auction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the auction associated with the advertisement */,
  "ad_platform" TEXT /* Platform used for advertising */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the advertising campaign */,
  "ad_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the advertising campaign */,
  "ad_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the advertising campaign */,
  "ad_target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the advertisement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advertising_auction_id FOREIGN KEY ("auction_id") REFERENCES auctions ("auction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost entry */,
  "auction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the auction to which this cost is associated */,
  "type_of_cost" TEXT /* Type of cost */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the cost */,
  "cost_date" TEXT /* Date the cost was incurred */,
  "cost_category" TEXT /* Category of the cost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_costs_auction_id FOREIGN KEY ("auction_id") REFERENCES auctions ("auction_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each auction event

ID of the seller involved in the auction
Role of the participant in the auction
ID of the auction associated with the report
